sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Van Kha Siangtho hong leeng a
A khawlna mun etlawm ee
Huih bang mau in lam bang in kipak ziahziah
Kamthak pau in kipau a
Lathak te zong ki sa khia
Van laukha a khawmna mun et in lawm ee

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Etlawm ee, etlawm Zion tate
The bang khuangin gungei
Sing bang huang diam diam
Etlawm ee, etlawm Sian vontawi te
Gual zawhna lasa in Topa phat uh hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khanlawhna mei bang hong kuang
Ki itna hong khang semsem
A ki-imcip mawhna te zong hong pho khia
A kilem lo mite tung kilem na daitui hong kia
Maigum mi zong maitai in
Hong diang khia ta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Dam lo te'n damna ngah a
Lunggim mite'n tawldamna
Topa tat sa gup ngah mi hong khang semsem
Vangliatna tawh kituam zo
Gualzo pen te ih hi hi
Teel tuam tate Topa ading mainawt ni
